hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then bunx biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi && case "$FILE" in *.test.ts|*.test.tsx) bunx vitest run --reporter=dot "$FILE" 2>&1;; *.tsx) TEST="${FILE%.tsx}.test.tsx"; if [ -f "$TEST" ]; then bunx vitest run --reporter=dot "$TEST" 2>&1; fi;; *.ts) TEST="${FILE%.ts}.test.ts"; if [ -f "$TEST" ]; then bunx vitest run --reporter=dot "$TEST" 2>&1; fi;; esac
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$FILE" in *.env*|*secret*|*.pem|*.key) echo "Blocked: $FILE is a sensitive file" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && RESULT=$(bun run ci 2>&1) || { echo "$RESULT" | tail -30; echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "CI checks failed. Fix lint, typecheck, or test errors before stopping."}'; }
